chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D47of 2022: Muhammad Umar alias Aamir Ali vs. Province of Sindh through Secretary Home Department &others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Waheed Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate Dates of hearing: 23.02.2022 Date of announcement: 23.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J.. Granted. (2-4). The petitioneris aggrieved by the order dated 24.11.2020, passed by learned IIIrd Additional District Judge, Shikarpur and has filed this petition seeking to have the same set aside. The said order had also been subject to review, which was dismissed and such findings had not been impugned by the petitioner. Even otherwise the petition is barred by laches and no justification could be articulated by the learned counsel in such regard.In view hereof this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
